bathtime:handbook-title: BathTime: It's time to take a bath!
bathtime:handbook-text:
BathTime
You've been toiling all day under the beating sun, now it's time to freshen up.

Gettin' dirty:
As you go about your daily business, you will accumulate stinkiness. After a while you'll start to smell bad. If you let things get too bad, you'll start to carry a visible miasma around with you, and flying insects will swarm in your presence. People won't want to hang with you, and animals will have an easier time picking up your trail.

To find out how you smell, use the 'Check your pits' button in the character menu.

Gettin' clean:
To clean up, you're going to need to take a bath. Bathing is simple: find some water and stand in it. However, bathing outside is uncomfortable and incovenient. It'll take you a long time to get clean shivering in a lake. You'll find that bathing indoors is much more pleasurable! Taking a bath indoors will more than triple the rate at which you get clean.

If routing water indoors is beyond your primitive grasp, you have a couple of options available. The simplest solution is to keep a bucket or barrel filled with water in your house, which you can use to bathe with
sneak+. This will slowly deplete the water, so you will need to refill your makeshift bath from time to time. If you tire of lugging water home from the nearest lake, you might find it easier to build a comfortable outhouse at the lake side. To check that your bathhouse is functioning correctly, open the character screen and check for the 'Taking a bath' status.

When you decide it's time to embrace true luxury, you can build a boiler to take heated baths. Bathing in a room containing a lit boiler full of hot water is the height of bliss. Time will fly by as you luxuriate, and you will find yourself getting clean twice as fast. Such a decadent bathing experience will soothe old wounds, restoring your health over time.

Gettin' dry:

After taking a bath, you'll want to towel off so you're not soaking wet and freezing cold. Towels can be crafted from cloth or wool (from the Wool mod). Using a towel will completely dry you off, leaving you ready to face the world.

After using a towel, it will be wet through and you'll need to give it some time to dry before using it again. Careful you don't mix your wet towel in with a stack of dry towels, or they'll all get a bit damp.

Towels are also handy if you get caught in the rain, or fall into a lake! Be careful though: if you fall into water or take a bath while you're carrying your towels, they'll get soaked through.

Gettin' fresh:
When you're ready to level up your bathing experience, you can stock your bathroom with soaps and perfumes. Soaps can be used while you are bathing, or with a bucket or barrel of water, to sud up and temporarily increase the effectiveness of bathing. Perfumes will instantly reduce how much you smell, and mask your scent from other humanoids or animals.

Note: soaps are currently supplied by the Soap and Lye or Boric Alchemy mods, and perfumes are supplied by the soap-treated poultices from the Soap and Lye mod. Stay tuned for expanded access to soaps and perfumes in future updates!
stinkiness-level-extreme-1: Flies are starting to follow you around.
stinkiness-level-extreme-2: Your stench could raise the dead.
stinkiness-level-extreme-4: Even the drifters find you repulsive.
stinkiness-level-high-2: Your scent lingers heavy in the air.
stinkiness-level-high-3: You're in dire need of a good soak.
stinkiness-level-high-4: Stale sweat permeates the air around you.
stinkiness-level-medium-0: You could do with taking a bath.
stinkiness-level-medium-1: You're gonna need to wash this shirt.
stinkiness-level-medium-2: A layer of grime is settling in.
stinkiness-level-low-1: Might want to take a dip.
stinkiness-level-low-2: You've been working hard, and it shows.
stinkiness-level-low-3: You wish you had deodorant... whatever that is.
stinkiness-level-low-4: Not quite dirty, but getting there.
stinkiness-level-clean-2: You're a paragon of personal hygeine.
stinkiness-level-perfume: <font color="#78278f">All you can smell is your luxurious perfume.</font>
trader-reaction-high-1: Step back! You're making me gag.
trader-reaction-high-3: Please, for the love of the gears, wash yourself!
trader-reaction-high-4: You're killing my business with that smell.
trader-reaction-medium-2: I'd appreciate it if you'd stand downwind.
trader-reaction-medium-3: A bath wouldn't hurt before our next deal.
trader-reaction-medium-4: You're wearing an interesting scent today.
trader-reaction-low-0: Seems you could use a bath, friend.
trader-reaction-low-2: A quick swim'll freshen you up.
trader-reaction-low-4: Bit of a long day, eh?
towel-item-info-fold: Needs to be folded before stacking with other dry towels.
bathtime:item-handbooktext-bathtime:towe: A delightful fluffy towel. Use this to dry off after taking a bath or getting caught out in the rain. You will have to let it dry off before you can use it again. Be careful not to carry it with you when you go diving into lakes, or it'll get soaking wet!
